prompt: Read the markdown checklist at ~/Desktop/kinbench/239-checklist.md ('- [ ] item' format), create a reminder in the list 'kinbench-imported' for each unchecked item. Fast path: `cerebellum 'reminders import_from_file kinbench-imported ~/Desktop/kinbench/239-checklist.md'` (the action parses '- [ ] item' lines and auto-creates the list if missing).
